transcript: Women stepped down the steps step by step, the last foot actually crossed the floor, the whole person walked directly under the bus, in a few seconds, disappeared from the passenger's view, at this point, the couple hugging in the back seat also experienced abnormalities, two faces sucked together like building blocks, seeing this scene, the man was dumbfounded, but he couldn't say a word, have you ever suspected seeing this, the earth is actually a virtual world, and there are always some inexplicable program vulnerabilities in this world, Bruce is a programmer with thick hair, taking advantage of the holiday he had so hard to wait for, he took his wife and daughter to the seaside for vacation, under an oversight, his daughter left their site carrying a puppet, waves billowing, the puppet was taken into the sea, after careful consideration by their daughter, she decided to bring the puppet back alone, when the couple reacts, only merciless waves remain on the shore, Afterwards, the couple fell into a deep sense of self-blame. In order to get rid of the pain earlier, the wife put away everything related to her daughter. Bruce couldn't accept this approach. He doesn't want his daughter to disappear so quickly. But when he picked up the fairy tale book, he discovered a strange thing. The letter of the cover word in memory should be E. Now it has become another one.
